where_to_eat.name: Hawker Centres
where_to_eat.description: Traditional local food courts offering authentic Singaporean cuisine at affordable prices. A must-visit for experiencing genuine local food culture.

where_to_eat.name: Mixed Rice Stalls
where_to_eat.description: Popular casual dining spots serving mixed rice dishes with various accompaniments. Common in neighborhoods and accessible for casual dining.

into_the_wild.name: Punggol Park
into_the_wild.description: A beautiful public park in the Punggol area that's popular with locals for evening gatherings and celebrations, offering green spaces for relaxation and community activities.

into_the_wild.name: Lim Chu Kang
into_the_wild.description: A darker, less developed area of Singapore visible from space at night, representing the island's quieter, more natural regions away from urban centers.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Merlion Fountain
gram_worthy_spots.description: Singapore's iconic lion fountain, one of the most classic and recognizable landmarks in the city-state, perfect for tourist photography.

gram_worthy_spots.name: West Coast PSA
gram_worthy_spots.description: A distinctive waterfront area highly identifiable from satellite imagery at night, offering unique views of Singapore's industrial and coastal landscape.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Little India
off_the_beaten_path.description: A culturally vibrant neighborhood with authentic Indian heritage, though less polished than other parts of Singapore, offering genuine local character and experiences.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Tanjong Katong Area
off_the_beaten_path.description: A local residential area representing everyday Singapore life and community spirit, known for its regular neighborhood activities and local character.
